skills.name: spec-agent
skills.description: Plays the agent role in a spec consensus session using the `spec` CLI.

skills.name: spec-proposer
skills.description: Proposes high-quality, verifiable specs with guardrails so the implementation matches expectations.

skills.name: spec-mediator
skills.description: Plays the mediator role to clarify/reframe stuck spec consensus sessions.

skills.name: spec-implementer
skills.description: Plays the implementer role — build/test/release from a locked spec.
